title: SiongUI
description: The UI Resourse pack for Minecraft 1.6.x, Colorful and Clear, Supported MITE SP
body:
MITE SP1.6.4~1.6.5的美化材质包
紫色的透明GUI外观
重做了矿物材质

Pay attention: ONLY CHINESE VERSION
注意: 仅中文版本

If You wanna use it in vanilla other language, pls delete all files in assets\minecraft\lang\

![设置页面](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddc8276c4f4789e162971df36d6ed2b2cf4c0f78.png)

![主页页面](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3db7debe0acfc2310fe751ea9eccb555959d839b.png)
背景部分取自1.18中的洞穴

![背包部分](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62712d3c547647ff5033ad6f8c983ad68a9e312a.png)

![成就提示](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed72a118e79b1a8485fc54c27a6653d392747999.png)

![死亡界面](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee2c6bbdd9509d3920cbb3fd8aefa5dd5184f1da.png)

![快捷栏](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0ff287881a8788502bf7f3eb1ed18d0a9543b84.png)
